SEARCH
程序包 LoginPage

类 MODataStore

java.lang.Object
LoginPage.MODataStore
public class MODataStore extends Object
Central data persistence layer for the TA Recruitment System. All data is stored in CSV files under the data/ directory.

Managed data files:

  • data/applicants.csv — applicant records
  • data/modules.csv — module/job vacancy records
  • data/messages.csv — message history between MO and TAs
  • data/interviews.csv — scheduled interview records

CSV files are created with sample data on first access if they do not exist.

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    static void
    addModule(Module module)
    Appends a new module record to the CSV file.
    static void
    ensureDataFilesExist()
    Ensures all required CSV data files exist.
    static int
    getApprovedCountForModule(String moduleName)
    Returns the number of applicants with status "Approved" for a given module.
    static int
    getPositionLimitForModule(String moduleName)
    Returns the position limit (max TAs) for a given module.
    static List<Applicant>
    loadApplicants()
    Loads all applicant records from the CSV file.
    static List<String[]>
    loadInterviews()
    Loads all interview records from the CSV file.
    static List<String[]>
    loadMessages()
    Loads all message records from the CSV file.
    static List<Module>
    loadModules()
    Loads all module records from the CSV file.
    static void
    saveApplicants(List<Applicant> applicants)
    Saves the full list of applicants back to the CSV file (overwrite).
    static void
    saveInterview(String applicantId, String applicantName, String moduleName, String date, String time, String location)
    Appends a scheduled interview record to the interviews CSV file.
    static void
    saveMessage(String senderId, String senderName, String recipientId, String recipientName, String moduleName, String content)
    Appends a sent message record to the messages CSV file.
    static void
    updateApplicantStatus(String applicantId, String moduleName, String newStatus)
    Updates the status of a specific applicant (by ID + module) and persists the change.
    static void
    updateModulePositionLimit(String moduleName, int newLimit)
    Updates the position limit for a given module and persists the change.
    static void
    updateModuleStatus(String moduleName, String newStatus)
    Updates the status of a module and persists the change.

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 构造器详细资料

    • MODataStore

      public MODataStore()

  • 方法详细资料

    • ensureDataFilesExist

      public static void ensureDataFilesExist()
      Ensures all required CSV data files exist. If a file is missing, it is created with a header row and sample data.

    • loadApplicants

      public static List<Applicant> loadApplicants()
      Loads all applicant records from the CSV file.
      返回:
      list of Applicant entities

    • saveApplicants

      public static void saveApplicants(List<Applicant> applicants)
      Saves the full list of applicants back to the CSV file (overwrite).
      参数:
      applicants - the complete applicant list to persist

    • updateApplicantStatus

      public static void updateApplicantStatus(String applicantId, String moduleName, String newStatus)
      Updates the status of a specific applicant (by ID + module) and persists the change.
      参数:
      applicantId - the applicant's ID
      moduleName - the module the applicant applied for
      newStatus - the new status (e.g. "Approved", "Rejected", "Shortlisted")

    • getApprovedCountForModule

      public static int getApprovedCountForModule(String moduleName)
      Returns the number of applicants with status "Approved" for a given module.
      参数:
      moduleName - the module to query
      返回:
      count of approved applicants

    • loadModules

      public static List<Module> loadModules()
      Loads all module records from the CSV file.
      返回:
      list of Module entities

    • addModule

      public static void addModule(Module module)
      Appends a new module record to the CSV file.
      参数:
      module - the module to add

    • getPositionLimitForModule

      public static int getPositionLimitForModule(String moduleName)
      Returns the position limit (max TAs) for a given module.
      参数:
      moduleName - the module name
      返回:
      the configured position limit, or 0 if not found

    • updateModulePositionLimit

      public static void updateModulePositionLimit(String moduleName, int newLimit)
      Updates the position limit for a given module and persists the change.
      参数:
      moduleName - the module name
      newLimit - the new position limit

    • updateModuleStatus

      public static void updateModuleStatus(String moduleName, String newStatus)
      Updates the status of a module and persists the change.
      参数:
      moduleName - the module name
      newStatus - the new status (e.g. "Approved", "Rejected: reason")

    • saveMessage

      public static void saveMessage(String senderId, String senderName, String recipientId, String recipientName, String moduleName, String content)
      Appends a sent message record to the messages CSV file.
      参数:
      senderId - ID of the sender
      senderName - name of the sender
      recipientId - ID of the recipient
      recipientName - name of the recipient
      moduleName - the related module
      content - the message body

    • loadMessages

      public static List<String[]> loadMessages()
      Loads all message records from the CSV file.
      返回:
      list of CSV rows (each row is a String array)

    • saveInterview

      public static void saveInterview(String applicantId, String applicantName, String moduleName, String date, String time, String location)
      Appends a scheduled interview record to the interviews CSV file.
      参数:
      applicantId - the applicant's ID
      applicantName - the applicant's name
      moduleName - the related module
      date - interview date (YYYY-MM-DD)
      time - interview time (HH:MM)
      location - interview location

    • loadInterviews

      public static List<String[]> loadInterviews()
      Loads all interview records from the CSV file.
      返回:
      list of CSV rows (each row is a String array)
